head: efd2267e5eb01f50acd811ff57a1f996feaa9800
done: Separated plugin and roundtable source, packages, launchers, ports, config, data, and tests.
Added static boundary and bidirectional runtime isolation tests.
Reduced the launcher lifecycle chain from 243.7 seconds to a bounded 8.5-12.5 seconds.
Pruned only the stale F:/web_agents-new-plugin-rewrite worktree registration while preserving branch refs.
remaining: Load the normal plugin build in a user-controlled browser and perform the interactive UI/MCP permission smoke.
Run a real DeepSeek/Doubao roundtable turn with user-owned logged-in tabs and manual verification handling.
